message:
fix: gt polecat list shows idle for actively working polecats (gas-8e3)

Cherry-pick merge of PR #2978 (polecat.go + test only). When a tmux
session is running but the polecat state is idle, effectivePolecatState
now correctly reports working. The manager.go changes were skipped
(already addressed by mains session-reuse refactor).

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2978
Author: quad341

Co-Authored-By: Jim Wordelman <jim@wordelman.name>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
